channel.title: debian on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in debian on IT notes

item.title: debian parted
item.description: Resize AWS Debian Jessie Probably instance will have 8GB, to extend the disk, for example to 40GB do this: Install parted: $ apt-get install parted Run: $ /sbin/parted ---pretend-input-tty /dev/xvda resizepart 1 yes 100% Resize2fs: $ resize2fs /dev/xvda1 Run lsblk: root@ip-10-20-1-17:~# lsblk NAME MAJ:MIN RM SIZE RO TYPE MOUNTPOINT xvda 202:0 0 40G 0 disk `-xvda1 202:1 0 40G 0 part /
